subject: style(themes): restore Sunset to original orange+red palette
body:
Dark variant returns to the original vivid orange (#f97316) primary
instead of the drifted deep red-orange (#c2410c). Light accent
aligned to red (#dc2626) matching dark, instead of rose-pink
(#e11d48). Both variants now share the same red accent — orange
vs red contrast is the theme's core identity.

Tags: themes, ui, color
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-variants
Semver: patch
title: restore Sunset to original orange+red palette
